text:
{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
  <TEXT>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeliefert:</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>
    <EDITOR>
      <NAME>Ant. Birrius</NAME>
      <ROLE>Nova cura retensuit digessit &c.</ROLE>
    </EDITOR>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <TEXT>Ingleichen geben sie auch den</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Notit.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME>
    <PAPER_TYPE>auf schön Schreib-Median-Papier</PAPER_TYPE>
    <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
    <AVAILABILITY>
      <TEXT>künftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur bis Ende Januarii</TEXT>
      <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
    </AVAILABILITY>
    <PRIZE_CURRENT>fl. 6.</PRIZE_CURRENT>
    <PRIZE_FUTURE>nach welcher Zeit kein Exemplar unter fl. 7:30 xr. verkauft werden solle.</PRIZE_FUTURE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration for proper XML formatting. 2. Structured the text into logical segments using <TEXT> tags. 3. Corrected and properly nested <BIBL> tags. 4. Separated the editor's name and role into <EDITOR>, <NAME>, and <ROLE> tags. 5. Fixed encoding issues in the text (e.g., \u221a\u00a7 to ä, \u221a\u00ba to ü). 6. Added <PAPER_TYPE> tag for the paper description. 7. Structured availability and pricing information with <AVAILABILITY>, <PRIZE_CURRENT>, and <PRIZE_FUTURE> tags. 8. Corrected typo in 'Notit' to 'Notit.'. 9. Escaped '&' to '&' for XML compliance. 10. Improved overall readability and logical flow of the XML structure."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
  <TEXT>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgeliefert:</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>
    <EDITOR>
      <NAME>Ant. Birrius</NAME>
      <ROLE>Nova cura retensuit digessit &c.</ROLE>
    </EDITOR>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
  </BIBL>
  <TEXT>Ingleichen geben sie auch den</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>T. Livium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Notit.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME>
    <PAPER_TYPE>auf schön Schreib-Median-Papier</PAPER_TYPE>
    <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
    <AVAILABILITY>
      <TEXT>künftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur bis Ende Januarii</TEXT>
      <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
    </AVAILABILITY>
    <PRIZE_CURRENT>fl. 6.</PRIZE_CURRENT>
    <PRIZE_FUTURE>nach welcher Zeit kein Exemplar unter fl. 7:30 xr. verkauft werden solle.</PRIZE_FUTURE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Added XML declaration for proper XML formatting. 2. Structured the text into logical segments using <TEXT> tags. 3. Corrected and properly nested <BIBL> tags. 4. Separated the editor's name and role into <EDITOR>, <NAME>, and <ROLE> tags. 5. Fixed encoding issues in the text (e.g., \u221a\u00a7 to ä, \u221a\u00ba to ü). 6. Added <PAPER_TYPE> tag for the paper description. 7. Structured availability and pricing information with <AVAILABILITY>, <PRIZE_CURRENT>, and <PRIZE_FUTURE> tags. 8. Corrected typo in 'Notit' to 'Notit.'. 9. Escaped '&' to '&' for XML compliance. 10. Improved overall readability and logical flow of the XML structure.
